description: Starter database generated from the user's curated EO foundation models workbook.

coverage_notes.note: This workbook is a comprehensive working registry as of 19 June 2026, not a mathematically exhaustive list. EO foundation-model papers are appearing rapidly, including arXiv preprints.

If a paper/repo did not disclose token count, parameter count, image count, or checkpoint license in the public source reviewed, the cell says 'not reported' or 'partial/unclear' rather than guessing.

Strong EO FM means trained at scale on EO/geospatial data, learns transferable representations, adapts to multiple downstream tasks, and handles geographic/time/sensor/modality variation. Partial means it meets some but not all criteria, or is domain/language/task-specific.
For a paper or presentation, use the Detailed_EO_FMs sheet as the main table and mention that the Extended_Registry sheet is a living appendix.
Each detailed row includes at least one primary or registry URL. For final academic use, check the latest paper/repo version and license before making strong claims about openness.

status_definitions.seed_verified: Curated detailed entry from the existing workbook. Still recommended to check latest paper/repo before publication.
status_definitions.seed_specialized: Curated entry from VLM/MLLM sheet. Specialized language-capable or grounding model.
status_definitions.watchlist_unverified: Registry/watchlist item. Needs source-paper verification before promotion to catalogue.
status_definitions.candidate_auto_extracted: New submission drafted by automation but not reviewed.
status_definitions.verified: Human-reviewed entry approved for public catalogue.
